ddls:
CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., State, National) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of category (e.g., crime, accident, others) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states_ut" (
  "state_ut_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state or union territory */,
  "state_ut_name" TEXT /* Name of the state or union territory */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type (State/UT) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region (e.g., North, South, East, West) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_ut_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crimes" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime record */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the crime belongs to */,
  "state_ut_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state or union territory where the crime was committed */,
  "total_arrests" INTEGER /* Total number of persons arrested */,
  "released_before_trial" INTEGER /* Number of persons released before trial */,
  "charge_sheeted" INTEGER /* Number of persons charge-sheeted */,
  "under_investigation" INTEGER /* Number of persons under investigation */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the crime data is for */,
  "crime_type" TEXT /* Type of crime (e.g., theft, murder, robbery) */,
  "crime_sub_type" TEXT /* Sub-type of crime (e.g., armed robbery, cybercrime) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crimes_state_ut_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_ut_id") REFERENCES states_ut ("state_ut_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime the trend is for */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend */,
  "trend_period" TEXT /* Period of the trend (e.g., monthly, quarterly, yearly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_trends_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hotspots" (
  "hotspot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hotspot */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime the hotspot is for */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the hotspot */,
  "hotspot_type" TEXT /* Type of hotspot (e.g., urban, rural, tourist area) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hotspot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hotspots_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., police, research) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the crime data */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the crime data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location of access (e.g., office, remote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime being predicted */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_crime_rate" REAL /* Predicted crime rate */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prediction_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the prediction model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the prediction model */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the prediction model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction model being evaluated */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime being predicted */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "performance_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES prediction_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source being imported */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime being imported */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was imported */,
  "import_status" TEXT /* Status of the import (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pendency" (
  "pendency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pendency record */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime being tracked */,
  "pendency_percentage" REAL /* Pendency percentage */,
  "all_india_total" REAL /* All-India total */,
  "pending_since" TEXT /* Date when the pendency started */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pendency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pendency_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "pendency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pendency record being noted */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note text */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_pendency_id FOREIGN KEY ("pendency_id") REFERENCES pendency ("pendency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigations" (
  "investigation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investigation */,
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime being investigated */,
  "investigation_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the investigation */,
  "investigation_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the investigation */,
  "investigation_status" TEXT /* Status of the investigation (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investigation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investigations_crime_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_id") REFERENCES crimes ("crime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investigation_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "investigation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investigation being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_text" TEXT /* Text of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investigation_updates_investigation_id FOREIGN KEY ("investigation_id") REFERENCES investigations ("investigation_id")
)
